Title: Successful login with valid credentials
Preconditions: User account exists and is active
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Login page
2. Enter valid email
3. Enter valid password
4. Click Login button
Expected Result: Login successful, Redirect to home page, Access token received

Title: Login fails with invalid email
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Login page
2. Enter non-existent email
3. Enter any password
4. Click Login button
Expected Result: Error message: Email hoac password khong dung, hay nhap lai

Title: Login fails with invalid password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Login page
2. Enter valid email
3. Enter wrong password
4. Click Login button
Expected Result: Error message: Email hoac password khong dung; Login attempts incremented

Title: Login fails with empty email field
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Login page
2. Leave email field empty
3. Enter password
4. Click Login button
Expected Result: Error message: Email va password la bat buoc

Title: Login fails with empty password field
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Login page
2. Enter valid email
3. Leave password field empty
4. Click Login button
Expected Result: Error message: Email va password la bat buoc

Title: Account locked after multiple failed login attempts
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Login page
2. Enter valid email
3. Enter wrong password
4. Repeat until max attempts reached
Expected Result: Account locked after max attempts, Error message with lock duration

Title: Login fails for being locked account
Preconditions: User account exists but being locked
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Login page
2. Enter email of locked account
3. Enter correct password
4. Click Login button
Expected Result: Error message: Tai khoan da bi khoa do dang nhap sai nhieu lan, vui long thu lai sauÖ

Title: Login with invalid email format
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Login page
2. Enter invalid email format
3. Enter password
4. Click Login button
Expected Result: Validation error for email format

Title: Successful logout
Test Steps:
1. Click Logout button
2. Confirm logout if prompted
Expected Result: Logout successful, Redirect to login page, Token cleared

Title: Session persistence after browser refresh
Test Steps:
1. Login successfully
2. Refresh browser page
3. Check session status
Expected Result: User remains logged in, No redirect to login page

Title: Access token refresh
Test Steps:
1. Wait for access token to expire
2. System auto-refreshes token
3. Verify new access token works
Expected Result: New access token issued, User session continues

Title: Access protected route without token
Test Steps:
1. Try to access protected API endpoint
2. Without authentication header
Expected Result: HTTP 401 Unauthorized, Redirect to login page

Title: View all bookings for logged-in user
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to bookings page
2. View booking list
Expected Result: All user's bookings displayed, Sorted by createdAt

Title: View bookings when user has no bookings
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to bookings page
Expected Result: Empty state displayed, Message indicating no bookings

Title: View available classes
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to available classes page
Expected Result: Only future non-cancelled classes with available slots shown

Title: Filter available classes by subject
Preconditions: Student logged in, Multiple subjects have classes
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to available classes
2. Select a subject filter
Expected Result: Only classes for selected subject shown

Title: View student profile
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to profile page
Expected Result: Profile displayed with all student fields: username, email, fullName, phoneNumber, studentId, GPA, major, academicYear, conductScore

Title: View tutor profile
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to profile page
Expected Result: Tutor profile displayed with relevant fields

Title: Update student profile - valid data
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to profile page
2. Edit fullName to: "New Name"
3. Click Save button
Expected Result:
Profile updated successfully
Success notification appears
New data is updated in Database

Title: Update profile with invalid phone number
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to profile page
2. Enter invalid phone number
3. Click Save button
Expected Result: Validation error

Title: Non-student tries to use student profile update API
Test Steps:
1. CALL POST /api/auth/login @instructor_test 
2. CALL PUT /api/auth/profile/student with token from response above and fullName "Test Name"
Expected Result: Error message: API nýy ch? dýnh cho student, HTTP 403

Title: Admin accesses admin panel
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to admin panel
Expected Result: Admin panel accessible, Admin features displayed

Title: Non-admin tries to access admin panel
Test Steps: 1. Try to navigate to admin routes
Expected Result: Access denied, HTTP 403 Forbidden

Title: Admin creates new user
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to user management
2. Click Create User
3. Fill user details
4. Select role
5. Submit
Expected Result: User created successfully, User can login

Title: Admin deactivates user account
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Target user exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to user management
2. Select user
3. Click Deactivate
Expected Result: User.isActive = false, User cannot login

Title: Login page displays correctly
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Verify all elements present
Expected Result: All elements visible and properly styled

Title: Password field masks input
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter password
3. Observe input masking
Expected Result: Password characters masked

Title: Calendar displays booked classes correctly
Preconditions: Student logged in, Has booked classes
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Calendar page
2. View booked sessions
Expected Result: Booked sessions displayed on correct dates

Title: Error messages display clearly
Test Steps:
1. Trigger various error conditions
2. Observe error message display
Expected Result: Error messages visible and readable

Title: Loading states displayed during API calls
Test Steps:
1. Perform action requiring API call
2. Observe loading state
Expected Result: Loading indicator displayed and removed after completion

Title: Login response time under normal load
Test Steps:
1. Simulate 100 concurrent login requests
2. Measure response times
Expected Result: Average response time <500ms, 95th percentile <1 second

Title: Booking service response time under peak load
Test Steps:
1. Simulate 300 concurrent booking requests
2. Measure response times
Expected Result: Average response time <1 second, Error rate <1%

Title: Database connection pool under load
Test Steps:
1. Simulate sustained load for 10 minutes
2. Monitor DB connections
Expected Result: No connection pool exhaustion
